'''鈭歵-n-dh-f''' ('''katandhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrise|fibrise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrise|fibrise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-n-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| katandhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitandhefoko|thitandhefoko]] || [[word:jitandhefoko|jitandhefoko]] || [[word:shitandhefoko|shitandhefoko]] || [[word:kitandhefoko|kitandhefoko]]
